title: delosperma neethlingiae
intro: Delosperma neethlingiae, also known as the Yellow Carpet or Yellow Stonecrop, is a type of flowering succulent plant native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Delosperma neethlingiae are said to include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and boosting the immune system. Delosperma neethlingiae can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
